'''鈭歯-zh-dh''' ('''kanazhadh''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yern|yern]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-zh-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yern|yern]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-zh-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kanazhadh
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinazhadh|thinazhadh]] || [[word:jinazhadh|jinazhadh]] || [[word:shinazhadh|shinazhadh]] || [[word:kinazhadh|kinazhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunazhadh|thuthunazhadh]] || [[word:jujunazhadh|jujunazhadh]] || [[word:shushunazhadh|shushunazhadh]] || [[word:kukunazhadh|kukunazhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunazhadh|thunazhadh]] || [[word:junazhadh|junazhadh]] || [[word:shunazhadh|shunazhadh]] || [[word:kunazhadh|kunazhadh]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunazhadh|thunazhadh]] || [[word:junazhadh|junazhadh]] || [[word:shunazhadh|shunazhadh]] || [[word:kunazhadh|kunazhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenazhadh|thenazhadh]] || [[word:jenazhadh|jenazhadh]] || [[word:shenazhadh|shenazhadh]] || [[word:kenazhadh|kenazhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonazhadh|thothonazhadh]] || [[word:jojonazhadh|jojonazhadh]] || [[word:shoshonazhadh|shoshonazhadh]] || [[word:kokonazhadh|kokonazhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonazhadh|thonazhadh]] || [[word:jonazhadh|jonazhadh]] || [[word:shonazhadh|shonazhadh]] || [[word:konazhadh|konazhadh]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonazhadh|thonazhadh]] || [[word:jonazhadh|jonazhadh]] || [[word:shonazhadh|shonazhadh]] || [[word:konazhadh|konazhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nazhadh|th忙nazhadh]] || [[word:j忙nazhadh|j忙nazhadh]] || [[word:sh忙nazhadh|sh忙nazhadh]] || [[word:k忙nazhadh|k忙nazhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanazhadh|thathanazhadh]] || [[word:jajanazhadh|jajanazhadh]] || [[word:shashanazhadh|shashanazhadh]] || [[word:kakanazhadh|kakanazhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanazhadh|thanazhadh]] || [[word:janazhadh|janazhadh]] || [[word:shanazhadh|shanazhadh]] || [[word:kanazhadh|kanazhadh]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanazhadh|thanazhadh]] || [[word:janazhadh|janazhadh]] || [[word:shanazhadh|shanazhadh]] || [[word:kanazhadh|kanazhadh]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shanazhadh|shanazhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshanazhadh|goshanazhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishanazhadh|gokishanazhadh]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shanazhadhn眉|shanazhadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkn眉|goshanazhadhnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhn眉|gokishanazhadhn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shanazhadhsh毛|shanazhadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnksh毛|goshanazhadhnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhsh毛|gokishanazhadhsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhadhro|shanazhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkro|goshanazhadhnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhro|gokishanazhadhro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhadhmu|shanazhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkmu|goshanazhadhnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhmu|gokishanazhadhmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shanazhadhsher|shanazhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnksher|goshanazhadhnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhsher|gokishanazhadhsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shanazhadhng|shanazhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkng|goshanazhadhnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhng|gokishanazhadhng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shanazhadhya|shanazhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkya|goshanazhadhnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhya|gokishanazhadhya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shanazhadhyam|shanazhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkyam|goshanazhadhnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhyam|gokishanazhadhyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhadhn眉sh毛|shanazhadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkn眉sh毛|goshanazhadhnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhn眉sh毛|gokishanazhadhn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhadhn眉ro|shanazhadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkn眉ro|goshanazhadhnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhn眉ro|gokishanazhadhn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhadhn眉mu|shanazhadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkn眉mu|goshanazhadhnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhn眉mu|gokishanazhadhn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhadhsh毛n眉|shanazhadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnksh毛n眉|goshanazhadhnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhsh毛n眉|gokishanazhadhsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhadhsh毛ro|shanazhadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnksh毛ro|goshanazhadhnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhsh毛ro|gokishanazhadhsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhadhsh毛mu|shanazhadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnksh毛mu|goshanazhadhnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhsh毛mu|gokishanazhadhsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhadhron眉|shanazhadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkron眉|goshanazhadhnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhron眉|gokishanazhadhron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhadhrosh毛|shanazhadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkrosh毛|goshanazhadhnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhrosh毛|gokishanazhadhrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shanazhadhromu|shanazhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkromu|goshanazhadhnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhromu|gokishanazhadhromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shanazhadhmun眉|shanazhadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkmun眉|goshanazhadhnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhmun眉|gokishanazhadhmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shanazhadhmush毛|shanazhadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkmush毛|goshanazhadhnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhmush毛|gokishanazhadhmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shanazhadhmuro|shanazhadhmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshanazhadhnkmuro|goshanazhadhnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishanazhadhmuro|gokishanazhadhmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|a335513}}
